facets.name: comment
facets.data: 2 demo NPCs at the inner plaza. Static — no ai-routine / dialog handlers yet. The dialog facet on each spawn carries pure data (lines + speaker); rendering the dialog UI lands once a screen-render or hud facet exists.

data.speaker: Villager
lines: Strange things have been moving past midnight.
If you head east, mind the fire.

data.speaker: Wanderer
lines: I've seen the sky bend out past the boss arena.
